story.text:
# ✨ Time Bind
**📜 → ⛓️(height) → 🔓(key) → 👁️**
*memora · inscription · V41*

Bind a chronicle entry to a specific block height. Reveal-on-key with Pattern B converts a bound chronicle to public chronicle.

> What was shielded may be revealed by the one who held the key. What is revealed cannot be unmade.

*Keywords:* time-bind · block · reveal · pattern-b · v5
